parameters.subject: ={{ '✅ ' + $json.body.project + ' — All Drawings Complete (' + $json.body.total_drawings + ' files)' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

✅ Drawing Package Complete

All ' + $json.body.total_drawings + ' fabrication drawings for project ' + $json.body.project + ' have been received. The ZIP file is attached.

Generated: ' + $json.body.timestamp + '

' }}
